meta.title: ISO 45001 Gap Analysis & Certification-Readiness Assessment
meta.subtitle: Clause-by-clause conformance review — {{org/site}}
meta.author: HSE Operations
meta.deid_notice: All personnel are referred to by role label. Identifiers and any disclosed conditions in the audit interview notes were pseudonymised before drafting; the re-identification key is held separately and is not part of this document.

sections.text: This gap analysis assesses {{org/site}} against {{ISO 45001:2018 | ISO 14001:2015 | ISO 45003:2021}}, clause by clause (clause set 4–10), scoring each clause's conformance from the supplied evidence on the 5-level maturity scale (KB-DATA-ISO45001-MATURITY) and framed by ISO/IEC 17021-1 certification-audit principles. Target: {{initial certification readiness | internal assurance | surveillance-audit prep}}. No clause is silently omitted — each is scored or marked N/A with a stated reason. Decision-support only; a competent person must review this output.

rows: No documented OH&S policy on file
Competence matrix exists; training records partial (E-7)
Procedure on paper; no corrective-action records (E-9)
sections.caption: Conformance matrix — every clause (4-10) scored on KB-DATA-ISO45001-MATURITY or marked N/A with reason

rows.title: No documented OH&S policy (clause 5.2)
rows.description: Clause 5.2 requires a documented OH&S policy authorised by top management; none exists. Mandatory clause at level <= 2.

rows.title: No internal-audit programme (clause 9.2)
rows.description: Clause 9.2 requires a planned internal-audit programme; none is established. Mandatory clause at level 0.

rows.title: Corrective-action loop not evidenced (clause 10.2)
rows.description: A nonconformity/corrective-action procedure exists but no records show it operating.

sections.text: Three certification-blockers (major nonconformities under ISO/IEC 17021-1) must be closed before a stage-2 certification audit: 5.2 OH&S policy (absent), 9.2 internal audit (absent), 10.2 corrective action (not evidenced). A blocker is NOT a minor finding and cannot be deferred past the cert date.

rows.control: Eliminate the gap: establish a documented OH&S policy authorised by top management
Engineer the audit programme into the MS calendar with automated scheduling
Administrative: monthly management-review standing item tracking corrective actions to closure

rows.action: Draft, approve and communicate a documented OH&S policy (cl. 5.2) — est. cost: low
Establish an internal-audit programme + train two internal auditors (cl. 9.2) — est. cost: medium
Stand up the corrective-action register and run it for one cycle (cl. 10.2) — est. cost: low
Complete competence-record backfill for clause 7.2 — est. cost: low

sections.text: Where evidence was not supplied a clause is scored as a gap (level 0/1) and the missing evidence is named as a [GAP] — not assumed conformant. [ASSUMPTION] items are labelled inline and must be confirmed by the lead auditor before sign-off.

Prepared by {{lead auditor role}}; SME review (persona: Lead Auditor / Management-Systems Consultant) ran before output. This gap analysis is decision-support only — it precedes and does NOT replace the human competent-person sign-off, and it does not certify the management system. Standard assessed: {{standard}}. Basis: ISO 45001:2018 clauses 4-10 + ISO/IEC 17021-1.

items: Conformance scale: KB-DATA-ISO45001-MATURITY (0 Absent -> 4 Measured & improving)
Related siblings via KB-SNIP-OPS-CLAUSE-MAP (e.g. legal register -> 6.1.3, competence -> 7.2)
